label: Transparent river otter motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Otter transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a river otter mammal motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A river otter in compact side profile with wet brown fur, darker river-mud back, cream whisker muzzle, small rounded ears, bright alert eyes, sleek tail curve, and subtle river-blue wet highlights. Anatomical accuracy, crisp subject edges, playful river mammal identity, no fox, no beaver.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full otter body, head, tail, paws, and whiskers without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no red fox, no beaver flat tail, no seal, no fish, no river landscape, no water splash scene, no props, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Otter light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Otter", derived from the visible river otter cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible playful finance system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Otter, River Otter Fur, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from wet otter-brown fur, cream whiskers, river-blue highlights, sandbank surfaces, bank-green success states, slick-fur warmth, and river-mud depth. The board must read as river otter, not red fox, beaver, seal, or generic brown finance app.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, transaction table rows, search command palette, account navigation, finance dashboard metric cards, cashflow line chart, budget bars, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, river-foam backgrounds, otter-brown primary actions, river-blue focus rings, cream-whisker highlights, rounded river-stone cards, whisker-line dividers, subtle wet-fur texture.
Constraints: no red fox orange palette, no beaver flat-tail imagery, no seal silhouette, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Otter", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Otter dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Otter". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible river otter cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Otter, River Otter Fur, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the otter system language: wet-fur dark backgrounds, river-foam text, otter-brown active controls, river-blue chart highlights, cream-whisker accents, sandbank surfaces, bank-green success, whisker-line dividers, wet-fur texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as river otter, not red fox, beaver, seal, or generic brown finance app.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, transaction table rows, search command palette, account navigation, finance dashboard metric cards, cashflow line chart, budget bars, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: wet-fur ink and river-mud surfaces, river-foam foreground, otter-brown controls, river-blue highlights, cream-whisker chips, bank-green success, subtle wet-fur overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no red fox orange palette, no beaver flat-tail imagery, no seal silhouette, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Otter".
